messages.subject: 🗓️ March is here. Let’s plan it properly.
messages.body:
March has started.
A new month is always a good moment to pause and ask yourself:
 Where am I going? And am I moving in the right direction?
Planning your IELTS preparation for the month can completely change your results. Not just studying randomly. Not just "doing something." But following a clear, structured path. And if you're not sure what to focus on, how to organise your preparation, or how to get results faster -- you probably don't need more materials. You need guidance.
You need someone who sees the full picture, understands your level, and can show you the shortest path to your target score. 
That's exactly what my course is about. It's self-paced, but you're not alone. You get structured modules, personalised tasks, and feedback from me. I personally supervise your progress and adjust the strategy when needed.
If March is the month you finally decide to do this properly, this is your sign.
Join the course and let's build a clear plan for your score.
P.S. The course price will increase soon, so if you've been thinking about it, now is a good time.
 [ https://www.ielts-assistant.com/courses/ielts-tips-and-secrets-full-course ]
'IELTS Tips and Secrets' self-paced online course
COURSE ACCESS DURATION: LIFETIME ACCESS
 TEACHER SUPPORT: 12 months
 VISIT WEBSITE [ https://www.ielts-assistant.com/courses/ielts-tips-and-secrets-full-course ]
Follow us on social media:
 [ https://www.facebook.com/ieltsSpeakingAssistantApp ] [ https://www.instagram.com/ielts_speaking_assistant_app/?hl=ru ] [ https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq0AqJG76m2r6QPwbgasY1A ] [ https://medium.com/@IELTS_Speaking ] [ https://t.me/ielts_preparation_assistant ] [ https://www.pinterest.com/ieltsspeaking/ ] [ https://vm.tiktok.com/ZML9xVSvN/ ]
Contact us
support@ielts-assistant.com

Click HERE if you don't want to receive free email lessons [ https://esputnik.com/unsubscribe ]
